title: biophytum sensitivum var. intermedium
intro: Biophytum sensitivum var. intermedium, also known as 'Pui', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Biophytum sensitivum var. intermedium is often prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
